root_cause: A configuration change setting max_cache_ttl_seconds to 0 at 14:30 disabled caching on recommendation-engine, forcing all requests to hit the database directly and driving P99 latency above 2000ms.
key_evidence: Config change at 14:30: max_cache_ttl_seconds changed from 3600 to 0
Latency_p99 spike from ~110ms to ~2400ms starting at 14:30
expected_mitigations: Add input validation to prevent zero or negative TTL values in production
notes: The config change timestamp and the latency spike timestamp should match exactly. No deploy or dependency outage to confuse the diagnosis.
